live.title: Gokulam Kerala FC vs Aizawl FC - 31 Mar 2026
live.shortDescription: Gokulam Kerala FC face Aizawl FC in a crucial Indian Football League 2026 clash, with both sides eager to climb the table. Aizawl’s sharper form gives them the edge, but Gokulam’s home advantage could tilt the balance. Which team will come out on top? Tune in to catch all the action from Indian Football League 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
